name: Notion for Startups
summary: Notion for Startups provides eligible startups with free access to Notion's Business plan, including Notion AI.
benefits: 6 months free on the Business plan with Notion AI included
3 months free with Notion AI included
1 month free with Notion AI included
eligibility: Affiliation with select startup partners (for 6-month offer)
Valid business website and company domain email address (for 3-month offer)
Under 10 employees (SMBs) or incomplete business information (for 1-month offer)
